App.Subtitle: Input statistics
Statistics.Title: General statistics
Keyboard.CustomKeysHint: Press a custom key and it will appear here automatically
Apps.Title: Application statistics
Activity.Title: Activity by time of day
Activity.DistanceHint: (based on pixels and the current monitor DPI)
Activity.WeekdayHint: The coefficient is relative to the average weekday
Templates.Title: Input templates
AddMouse.Title: Add mouse button
AddMouse.Waiting: Press any mouse button you want to add...
Mouse.NoCustomButtons: No added buttons. Press + Add button
Settings.StartupHint: The app will start automatically when you sign in
Settings.BreakHint: Notify you when you work too long without stopping
Settings.BackgroundHint: Shown very transparently so it does not interfere with the interface. Uses the built-in image by default.
Settings.AboutDescription: ClickStat - keyboard and mouse input statistics
Settings.AboutStorage: All data is stored locally in ~/Documents/KeyClick/key_statistics.db
Gamepads.InitialStatus: Press Add gamepad or connect a controller and it will appear here.
Gamepads.NoneStatus: No gamepads found yet. Connect an Xbox, PlayStation, or generic USB/Bluetooth controller and press Add.
Gamepads.FoundStatus: Found: {0}, connected now: {1}. Profile is selected automatically: Xbox, PlayStation, or Generic.
Gamepads.XboxDescription: XInput: precise buttons, triggers, and both sticks.
Gamepads.PlayStationDescription: DirectInput/WinMM: DualSense, DualShock, and similar Bluetooth/USB controllers.
Gamepads.GenericDescription: Any generic joystick HID: B1-B16 buttons and main axes.
Gamepads.NoneHint: Connect a gamepad and press Add gamepad. If Windows sees it, ClickStat will show its profile, buttons, triggers, and sticks.
Gamepads.XboxProfileDescription: XInput: precise A/B/X/Y buttons, bumpers, triggers, and sticks.
Gamepads.PlayStationProfileDescription: DirectInput/Joystick: PlayStation profile with face buttons, L/R, and sticks.
Gamepads.GenericProfileDescription: Generic joystick API: B1-B16 buttons and main controller axes.
